mapper.sql: projectId, projectType, projectCode, projectName, projectState, isback, column001, column002, column003, column004, column005, column006, column007, column008, column009, column010, column011, column012, columno12_readonly, column013, customerProjectName, salesType, compId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, projectStartTime, projectRefreshTime, projectCloseTime, customInfo, customConfig, column014
mapper.insert: insert into pm_project (projectType, projectCode, projectName, projectState, isback, column001, column002, column003, column004, column005, column006, column007, column008, column009, column010, column011, column012, columno12_readonly, column013, customerProjectName, salesType, compId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, projectStartTime, projectRefreshTime, projectCloseTime, customInfo, customConfig, column014) values (#{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isback,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column001,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column002,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column003,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column004,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column005,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column006,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column007,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column008,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column009,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{column010,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column011,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column012,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{columno12_readonly,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{column013,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectRefreshTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectCloseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}, #{customConfig,jdbcType=JSON}, #{column014,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into pm_project
projectType,
projectCode,
projectName,
projectState,
isback,
column001,
column002,
column003,
column004,
column005,
column006,
column007,
column008,
column009,
column010,
column011,
column012,
columno12_readonly,
column013,
customerProjectName,
salesType,
compId,
createTime,
createBy,
updateTime,
updateBy,
effectiveFrom,
effectiveTo,
disabled,
projectStartTime,
projectRefreshTime,
projectCloseTime,
customInfo,
customConfig,
column014,
#{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isback,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column001,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column002,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column003,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column004,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column005,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column006,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column007,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column008,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column009,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{column010,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column011,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column012,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{columno12_readonly,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{column013,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{salesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{projectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{projectRefreshTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{projectCloseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON},
#{customConfig,jdbcType=JSON},
#{column014,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update pm_project
projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectCode = #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectName = #{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectState = #{projectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
isback = #{isback,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column001 = #{column001,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column002 = #{column002,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column003 = #{column003,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column004 = #{column004,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column005 = #{column005,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column006 = #{column006,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column007 = #{column007,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column008 = #{column008,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column009 = #{column009,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
column010 = #{column010,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column011 = #{column011,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column012 = #{column012,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
columno12_readonly = #{columno12_readonly,jdbcType=INTEGER},
column013 = #{column013,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerProjectName = #{customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salesType = #{salesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compId = #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
projectStartTime = #{projectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
projectRefreshTime = #{projectRefreshTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
projectCloseTime = #{projectCloseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}),
customConfig = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customConfig, "{}"), #{customConfig,jdbcType=JSON}),
column014 = #{column014,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

sql.if: (ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

if.if: (ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

sql.if: ( ph.projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectState like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.isback like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column001 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column002 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column003 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column004 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column005 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column006 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column007 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column008 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column010 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column011 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column012 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column013 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.customerProjectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.salesType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.customConfig like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column014 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select: select count(1) from pm_project as ph

SELECT ph.*, bd.`basicDataName` as projectStateName, bd2.`basicDataName` as projectTypeName, c.compAbbr, c.compName
, GROUP_CONCAT(distinct och.contract_num) AS collectContractNos, SUM(och.contract_money_amount) AS contractAmount, SUM(och.collected_money_amount) AS collectedAmount, SUM(och.delivered_money_amount) AS deliveredAmount,
ROUND(SUM(och.collected_money_amount) / SUM(och.contract_money_amount), 2) AS collectedRatio
FROM pm_project AS ph
LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr ON pgr.projectCode = ph.projectCode LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pc.projectGroupCode = pgr.projectGroupCode LEFT JOIN `sms_ofst_contract_head_sap` och ON och.contract_num = pc.contractNo
LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data bd ON bd.`dataTypeCode` = concat(ph.`projectType`, "_projectState") AND bd.`basicDataId` = ph.`projectState` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data bd2 ON bd2.`dataTypeCode` = "projectTypes" AND bd2.`basicDataId` = ph.projectType LEFT JOIN `t_company` c ON c.id = ph.`compId`
( (
1 = 1 AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`projectType`, #{model.projectTypes}) AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`column001`, #{model.officeCodes}) AND
)
OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_member pm WHERE pm.projectId = ph.`projectId` AND pm.projectType = ph.`projectType` AND IFNULL(pm.effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") > NOW() AND pm.memberCode = #{model.memberCode})
) AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`projectId`, #{model.projectIds}) AND
GROUP BY ph.projectId

select count(1) from pm_project as ph
( (
1 = 1 AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`projectType`, #{model.projectTypes}) AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`column001`, #{model.officeCodes}) AND
)
OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_member pm WHERE pm.projectId = ph.`projectId` AND pm.projectType = ph.`projectType` AND IFNULL(pm.effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") > NOW() AND pm.memberCode = #{model.memberCode})
) AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`projectId`, #{model.projectIds}) AND

select ph.*, bd.`basicDataName` as projectStateName from pm_project ph LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data bd ON bd.`dataTypeCode` = concat(ph.`projectType`, "_projectState") AND bd.`basicDataId` = ph.`projectState` where ph.projectId = #{projectId}

select ph.projectState, bd.`basicDataName` as projectStateName from pm_project ph LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data bd ON bd.`dataTypeCode` = concat(ph.`projectType`, "_projectState") AND bd.`basicDataId` = ph.`projectState` where ph.projectId = #{projectId}
mapper.sql:
select distinct null as `projectId`, pp.projectCode as `projectCode`, null as `rank`, ifnull(pp.projectName, p.projectName) as `projectName`,
ifnull(`p`.`contractNo`, pp.projectCode) as `contractNo`, ifnull(`p`.`orderExecNumber`, pp.orderExecNumber) as `smsOrderExecNumber`, ifnull(c1.id, c2.id) as compId, `pp`.`officeCode` as `officeCode`, ifnull(c1.compAbbr, c2.compAbbr) as compAbbr, ifnull(c1.compName, c2.compName) as compName, `d`.`departmentName` as `officeName`, `pp`.`salesManCode` as `salesManCode`, concat(`pp`.`salesManCode`, "-", `pp`.`salesManName`) as `salesManName`, null as `projectStartTime`, null as projectCreateTime, `pp`.`systemName` as `systemName`, null as `serviceManager`, null as `serviceManagerName`, null as `projectManager`, null as `projectManagerName`, null as shipmentStateName, null as shipmentState, null as planStateName, null as projectPlanState, null as executionStateName, null as executionState, null as closeProcessStateName, null as closeProcessState, null as projectRefreshTime, null as projectCloseTime, null ssfs, null ssfsName, null partnerChannel, pp.projectType, pp.predBidDate as smsPredBidDate from `pm_project_property_af_from_sms` `pp` left join `pm_order_data_from_sap` `p` on `p`.`orderExecNumber` = `pp`.`orderExecNumber` left join `view_distinct_contract` `v` on `v`.`id` = `p`.`id` left join `fnd_department` `d` on `pp`.`officeCode` = `d`.`departmentNum`
left join t_company c1 on c1.compCode = p.compCode left join t_company c2 on c2.`compCode` = pp.corporationCode where
pp.`projectType` = 'afss'
and pp.projectType = #{model.projectType}
AND pp.projectCode like concat("%", #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND IFNULL(pp.projectName, p.projectName) like concat("%", #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND p.contractNo like concat("%", #{model.contractNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.orderExecNumber like concat("%", #{model.smsOrderExecNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.orderExecNumber like concat("%", #{model.customInfo.smsOrderExecNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.salesManName like concat("%", #{model.salesManName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.salesManName like concat("%", #{model.customInfo.salesManName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.officeCode = #{model.column001, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND pp.marketName like concat("%", #{model.column004, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.systemName like concat("%", #{model.column005, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.expendName like concat("%", #{model.column006, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.industryName like concat("%", #{model.column007, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} = IFNULL(c1.id, c2.id)
AND FIND_IN_SET(pp.`projectType`, #{model.projectTypes})
AND FIND_IN_SET(pp.`officeCode`, #{model.officeCodes})
AND pp.predBidDate >= #{model.smsPredBidStartDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
AND pp.predBidDate <= #{model.smsPredBidEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
AND ( pp.projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or p.contractNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
and not exists (select 1 from `pm_project_contract` `t1` join `pm_project_group_relationship` `t2` on `t1`.`projectGroupCode` = `t2`.`projectGroupCode` join `pm_project` `t3` on (
`t3`.`projectCode` = replace(`t2`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") )
and `t3`.`effectiveFrom` <= now() and ( `t3`.`effectiveTo` > now() or isnull(`t3`.`effectiveTo`) )
where t3.`projectType` = pp.`projectType` and ( (
`t1`.`contractNo` = IFNULL(`v`.`contractNo`, pp.`projectCode`) ) )) and ( v.`contractNo` is not null
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM `pm_project_property_af_from_sms` `t1` INNER JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` `t2` ON `t1`.`orderExecNumber` = `t2`.`orderExecNumber` WHERE t1.`projectCode` = pp.`projectCode`) )
union select distinct null as `projectId`, pp.projectCode as `projectCode`, null as `rank`, ifnull(pp.projectName, p.projectName) as `projectName`,
ifnull(`p`.`contractNo`, pp.projectCode) as `contractNo`, ifnull(`p`.`orderExecNumber`, pp.orderExecNumber) as `smsOrderExecNumber`, ifnull(c1.id, c2.id) as compId, `pp`.`officeCode` as `officeCode`, ifnull(c1.compAbbr, c2.compAbbr) as compAbbr, ifnull(c1.compName, c2.compName) as compName, `d`.`departmentName` as `officeName`, `pp`.`salesManCode` as `salesManCode`, concat(`pp`.`salesManCode`, "-", `pp`.`salesManName`) as `salesManName`, null as `projectStartTime`, null as projectCreateTime, `pp`.`systemName` as `systemName`, null as `serviceManager`, null as `serviceManagerName`, null as `projectManager`, null as `projectManagerName`, null as shipmentStateName, null as shipmentState, null as planStateName, null as projectPlanState, null as executionStateName, null as executionState, null as closeProcessStateName, null as closeProcessState, null as projectRefreshTime, null as projectCloseTime, null ssfs, null ssfsName, null partnerChannel, pp.projectType, pp.predBidDate as smsPredBidDate from `pm_project_property_af_from_sms` `pp` left join `pm_order_data_from_sap` `p` on `p`.`orderExecNumber` = `pp`.`orderExecNumber`
left join `fnd_department` `d` on `pp`.`officeCode` = `d`.`departmentNum`
left join t_company c1 on c1.compCode = p.compCode left join t_company c2 on c2.`compCode` = pp.corporationCode where
pp.`projectType` = 'afxx'
and pp.projectType = #{model.projectType}
AND pp.projectCode like concat("%", #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND IFNULL(pp.projectName, p.projectName) like concat("%", #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND p.contractNo like concat("%", #{model.contractNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.orderExecNumber like concat("%", #{model.smsOrderExecNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.orderExecNumber like concat("%", #{model.customInfo.smsOrderExecNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.salesManName like concat("%", #{model.salesManName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.salesManName like concat("%", #{model.customInfo.salesManName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.officeCode = #{model.column001, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND pp.marketName like concat("%", #{model.column004, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.systemName like concat("%", #{model.column005, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.expendName like concat("%", #{model.column006, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.industryName like concat("%", #{model.column007, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} = IFNULL(c1.id, c2.id)
AND FIND_IN_SET(pp.`projectType`, #{model.projectTypes})
AND FIND_IN_SET(pp.`officeCode`, #{model.officeCodes})
AND pp.predBidDate >= #{model.smsPredBidStartDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
AND pp.predBidDate <= #{model.smsPredBidEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
AND ( pp.projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or p.contractNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
and not exists (select 1 from `pm_project_contract` `t1` join `pm_project_group_relationship` `t2` on `t1`.`projectGroupCode` = `t2`.`projectGroupCode` join `pm_project` `t3` on (
`t3`.`projectCode` = replace(`t2`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") )
and `t3`.`effectiveFrom` <= now() and ( `t3`.`effectiveTo` > now() or isnull(`t3`.`effectiveTo`) )
where t3.`projectType` = pp.`projectType`
and pp.`projectCode` = t1.`contractNo` )
union all SELECT ph.`projectId`, `projectCode`, NULL AS `rank`, `projectName`,
ph.customInfo ->> "$.contractNo" AS `contractNo`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.smsOrderExecNumber" AS `smsOrderExecNumber`, ph.compId, ph.`column001` AS `officeCode`, c1.compAbbr as compAbbr, c1.compName as compName, ph.customInfo ->> "$.officeName" AS `officeName`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.salesManCode" AS `salesManCode`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.salesManName" AS `salesManName`, ph.`projectStartTime`, ph.createTime AS projectCreateTime, ph.`column005` AS `systemName`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.serviceManagerCode" AS `serviceManager`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.serviceManagerforjson" AS `serviceManagerName`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.programManagerCode" AS `projectManager`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.programManagerCodeforjson" AS `projectManagerName`, NULL AS shipmentStateName, NULL AS shipmentState, NULL AS planStateName, NULL AS projectPlanState, NULL AS executionStateName, NULL AS executionState, NULL AS closeProcessStateName, NULL AS closeProcessState, NULL AS projectRefreshTime, NULL AS projectCloseTime, NULL ssfs, NULL ssfsName, NULL partnerChannel, ph.projectType, ph.customInfo ->> "$.smsPredBidDate" AS smsPredBidDate FROM pm_project ph
left join t_company c1 on c1.id = ph.compId
mapper.select:
select podfs.id as podfsId, t1.basicDataName as column012, pppfs.projectType, pppfs.objId as relateId, pppfs.channelName as agentChannel,
ifnull(podfs.contractNo, pppfs.projectCode) as contractNo, case when pppfs.projectCode is null then podfs.contractNo else pppfs.projectCode end as projectCode, ifnull(if(podfs.salesType = '01' and #{projectType} = '10', podfs.projectName, pppfs.projectName), podfs.projectName) as projectName, podfs.orderCreateTime column009, podfs.customerCode column002, podfs.customerName column003, pppfs.salesManCode salesManCode, concat(pppfs.salesManCode, "-", pppfs.salesManName) salesManName, pppfs.marketCode marketCode, pppfs.marketName column004, pppfs.systemId systemId, pppfs.systemName column005, pppfs.expendId expendId, pppfs.expendName column006, pppfs.industryId, pppfs.industryName column007, pppfs.officeCode column001, fd.departmentName officeName,
pph.column008 column008, pph.column010 column010, pph.column011 column011, pph.column012 column012, IFNULL(t1.basicDataName, -1) as column012Readonly, pph.column013 column013, ifnull(podfs.compCode, pppfs.corporationCode) as compCode, ifnull(c.id, c1.id) as compId, ifnull(podfs.salesType, pppfs.projectType) as salesType, pppfs.projectMoney as smsProjectAmount, pppfs.afProjectMoney as smsAfProjectAmount, pppfs.projectCode as smsProjectCode, pppfs.submitTime as smsSubmitTime, pppfs.orderExecNumber as smsOrderExecNumber, pppfs.predBidDate as smsPredBidDate
,concat( '{', concat('"customerPerson":"', ifnull(pppfs.receiveMen, ""), '"'), concat(',"customerTel":"', ifnull(pppfs.reveiveContactWay,""), '"'), concat(',"customerAddress":"', ifnull(pppfs.receiveAddress,""), '"'), concat(',"afxxReason":"', ifnull( pppfs.lendCause, ""), '"'), concat(',"requireInDate":"', ifnull(pppfs.requireInDate, ""), '"'), concat(',"pspm":"', ifnull( pppfs.pspm, ""), '"'), concat(',"pspmName":"', ifnull( pppfs.pspmName, ""), '"'), concat(',"salesMenTel":"', ifnull( pppfs.salesMenTel, ""), '"'), concat(',"decPath":"', ifnull( pppfs.decPath, ""), '"') , '}') as customInfo
from pm_project_property_af_from_sms pppfs left join pm_order_data_from_sap podfs on podfs.orderExecNumber = pppfs.orderExecNumber left join pm_project pph on podfs.contractNo = pph.projectCode and pppfs.projectType = pph.projectType left join fnd_department fd on fd.departmentNum = pppfs.officeCode
left join fnd_basic_data t1 on pppfs.serviceTypeName = t1.basicDataId and t1.dataTypeCode = 21 and t1.effectiveFrom <= now() and ( t1.effectiveTo > now() or t1.effectiveTo is null ) left join fnd_company c on c.code = podfs.compCode left join fnd_company c1 on c1.code = pppfs.corporationCode
where pppfs.projectType = #{projectType}
and pppfs.projectCode = #{contractNo}
and podfs.contractNo = #{contractNo}
union all select podfs.id as podfsId, t1.basicDataName as column012, pppfs.projectType, pppfs.objId as relateId, pppfs.channelName as agentChannel,
ifnull(podfs.contractNo, pppfs.projectCode) as contractNo, case when pppfs.projectCode is null then podfs.contractNo else pppfs.projectCode end as projectCode, ifnull(if(podfs.salesType = '01' and #{projectType} = '10', podfs.projectName, pppfs.projectName), podfs.projectName) as projectName, podfs.orderCreateTime column009, podfs.customerCode column002, podfs.customerName column003, pppfs.salesManCode salesManCode, concat(pppfs.salesManCode, "-", pppfs.salesManName) salesManName, pppfs.marketCode marketCode, pppfs.marketName column004, pppfs.systemId systemId, pppfs.systemName column005, pppfs.expendId expendId, pppfs.expendName column006, pppfs.industryId, pppfs.industryName column007, pppfs.officeCode column001, fd.departmentName officeName,
pph.column008 column008, pph.column010 column010, pph.column011 column011, pph.column012 column012, IFNULL(t1.basicDataName, -1) as column012Readonly, pph.column013 column013, ifnull(podfs.compCode, pppfs.corporationCode) as compCode, ifnull(c.id, c1.id) as compId, ifnull(podfs.salesType, pppfs.projectType) as salesType, pppfs.projectMoney as smsProjectAmount, pppfs.afProjectMoney as smsAfProjectAmount, pppfs.projectCode as smsProjectCode, pppfs.submitTime as smsSubmitTime, pppfs.orderExecNumber as smsOrderExecNumber, pppfs.predBidDate as smsPredBidDate
,concat( '{', concat('"customerPerson":"', ifnull(pppfs.receiveMen, ""), '"'), concat(',"customerTel":"', ifnull(pppfs.reveiveContactWay,""), '"'), concat(',"customerAddress":"', ifnull(pppfs.receiveAddress,""), '"'), concat(',"afxxReason":"', ifnull( pppfs.lendCause, ""), '"'), concat(',"requireInDate":"', ifnull(pppfs.requireInDate, ""), '"'), concat(',"pspm":"', ifnull( pppfs.pspm, ""), '"'), concat(',"pspmName":"', ifnull( pppfs.pspmName, ""), '"'), concat(',"salesMenTel":"', ifnull( pppfs.salesMenTel, ""), '"'), concat(',"decPath":"', ifnull( pppfs.decPath, ""), '"') , '}') as customInfo
from pm_project_property_af_from_sms pppfs left join pm_order_data_from_sap podfs on podfs.orderExecNumber = pppfs.orderExecNumber left join pm_project pph on podfs.contractNo = pph.projectCode and pppfs.projectType = pph.projectType left join fnd_department fd on fd.departmentNum = pppfs.officeCode
left join fnd_basic_data t1 on pppfs.serviceTypeName = t1.basicDataId and t1.dataTypeCode = 21 and t1.effectiveFrom <= now() and ( t1.effectiveTo > now() or t1.effectiveTo is null ) left join fnd_company c on c.code = podfs.compCode left join fnd_company c1 on c1.code = pppfs.corporationCode
where pppfs.projectType = #{projectType} and pppfs.projectCode = #{contractNo}
order by podfsId desc, relateId desc limit 1

SELECT ppfs.id, ppfs.`projectCode`, ppfs.`orderExecNumber`, ppfs.`corporationCode`, ppfs.ssfrId, ppfs.productCode, ppfs.productfirstCode, ppfs.`productName`, ppfs.`productfirstName`, ppfs.`productsubCode`, ppfs.`productSubModel`, ppfs.`productSubName`, ppfs.num, ppfs.borrowNum, ppfs.price, ppfs.purchaseDiscount, ppfs.purchasePrice FROM `pm_project_product_af_from_sms` ppfs INNER JOIN (SELECT projectCode, max(orderExecNumber) AS orderExecNumber FROM pm_project_property_af_from_sms ppfs
ppfs.projectCode = #{projectCode} AND ppfs.orderExecNumber = #{orderExecNumber} AND ppfs.projectType = #{projectType} AND
GROUP BY projectCode) mppfs ON mppfs.projectCode = ppfs.`projectCode` AND mppfs.orderExecNumber = ppfs.`orderExecNumber`
ppfs.projectCode = #{projectCode} AND ppfs.orderExecNumber = #{orderExecNumber} AND FIND_IN_SET(ppfs.productfirstCode, #{productfirstCode}) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppfs.productfirstName, #{productfirstName}) AND
UNION ALL SELECT pplp.id, ppfs.`projectCode`, ppfs.`orderExecNumber`, ppfs.`corporationCode`, NULL AS ssfrId, NULL AS productCode, NULL productfirstCode, pplp.`productName`, pplp.`productfirstName`, pplp.`productsubCode`, pplp.`productSubModel`, pplp.`productSubName`, pplp.`lendNum` AS num, pplp.`lendNum` AS borrowNum, NULL AS price, NULL AS purchaseDiscount, NULL AS purchasePrice FROM `pm_project_property_af_from_sms` ppfs INNER JOIN (SELECT projectCode, MAX(orderExecNumber) AS orderExecNumber FROM pm_project_property_af_from_sms ppfs
ppfs.projectCode = #{projectCode} AND ppfs.orderExecNumber = #{orderExecNumber} AND ppfs.projectType = #{projectType} AND
GROUP BY projectCode) mppfs ON mppfs.projectCode = ppfs.`projectCode` AND mppfs.orderExecNumber = ppfs.`orderExecNumber` INNER JOIN `pm_presales_lend_product_from_sms` pplp ON ppfs.`id` = pplp.`lendInfoId`
ppfs.projectCode = #{projectCode} AND ppfs.orderExecNumber = #{orderExecNumber} AND
FIND_IN_SET(pplp.productfirstName, #{productfirstName}) AND

select p.`permission_name` from `t_permission` p left join `t_role_permission` rp on rp.permission_id = p.permission_id left join `t_role` r on rp.role_id = r.role_id left join `fnd_basic_data` db on db.dataTypeCode = 'afProjectMember'
and find_in_set(db.basicDataId, #{memberRoles})
and p.permission_name regexp ":detail|:list"
and r.role_name = db.basicDataAttri1 where r.role_name = db.basicDataAttri1
and p.permission_name regexp #{permissionTypes}

select r.`role_name` from t_user_info ui inner join t_user_role ur on ui.`user_id` = ur.`user_id` and ur.`comp_id` = ui.`compID` inner join `t_role` r on ur.`role_id` = r.`role_id` left join `fnd_basic_data` db on db.dataTypeCode = 'afProjectMember'
and find_in_set(db.basicDataId, #{memberRoles})
and r.role_name = db.basicDataAttri1 where ui.id = #{userInfoId} and ( r.role_name = db.basicDataAttri1 or r.`role_name` in ("admin", "projectAdmin")
or r.`role_name` in ("projectSubAdmin", "projectAreaManager")
)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `pm_project_contract` ( contractNo, projectGroupCode, createTime, createBy ) SELECT #{contractNo}, pgr.projectGroupCode, NOW(), #{createBy} FROM `pm_project_group` pg left join pm_project_group_relationship pgr on pg.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN pm_project p ON pgr.`projectCode` = p.`projectCode` and p.`projectType` = pg.`projectType` WHERE projectId = #{projectId} LIMIT 1
mapper.select:
select *, concat( "insert into ", tableName, "(", columns, ") select ", replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( columnsWithAlias, concat(tableAlias, ".projectId,"), "'?' as projectId," ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectType,"), "'?' as projectType," ), concat(tableAlias, ".objId,"), "'?' as objId," ), concat(tableAlias, ".objType,"), "'?' as objType," ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectCode,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.projectCode, ", tableAlias, ".projectCode) projectCode,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectName,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.projectName, ", tableAlias, ".projectName) projectName,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".contractNo,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.customInfo ->> '$.contractNo', ", tableAlias, ".contractNo) contractNo,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".officeCode,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.column001, ", tableAlias, ".officeCode) officeCode,") ), " from ", tableName, " as ", tableAlias, " left join pm_project nph on nph.projectId = '?' and nph.projectType = '?' ", " where ", replace(queryColumnsWithAlias, ",", "='?' AND "), "='?' " ) as `insertSql`, IF( queryColumns = "projectIds", concat( "update ", tableName, " as ", tableAlias, " set ", tableAlias, ".projectIds = concat(projectIds, ',?') where FIND_IN_SET('?', ", queryColumnsWithAlias, ")" ), null ) as `updateSql`, IF(hasCustomInfo , concat( "update ", tableName, " as ", tableAlias, " set ", concat_ws(",", IF(hasCustomInfo, concat(tableAlias, ".customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(", tableAlias, ".customInfo, '{}'), '{\"transferProjectId\": ?, \"transferProjectFlag\": 1}')"), null)
), " where ", replace( queryColumnsWithAlias, ",", "='?' AND " ), "='?' " ), null ) as transferFlagSql from (select t.`TABLE_NAME` as tableName, t.tableAlias, group_concat(distinct pc.column_name order by pc.`ORDINAL_POSITION`) primaryKeys, group_concat(distinct c.column_name order by c.`column_name`) queryColumns, concat(group_concat(distinct c.column_name order by c.`column_name`), ",", group_concat(distinct ac.column_name order by ac.`ORDINAL_POSITION`)) columns, concat(group_concat(distinct concat(t.tableAlias, ".", c.column_name) order by c.`column_name`), ",", group_concat(distinct concat(t.tableAlias, ".", ac.column_name) order by ac.`ORDINAL_POSITION`)) columnsWithAlias, group_concat(distinct concat(t.tableAlias, ".", c.column_name) order by c.`column_name`) queryColumnsWithAlias, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'customInfo') as hasCustomInfo, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'effectiveTo') as hasEffectiveTo, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'disabled') as hasDisabled, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'deleted') as hasDeleted from
(select t.*, GROUP_CONCAT( SUBSTRING( SUBSTRING_INDEX( SUBSTRING_INDEX(t.TABLE_NAME, '_', sh.id + 1), '_', - 1 ), 1, 1 ) separator "" ) as tableAlias from information_schema.tables t left join find_in_set_help sh on sh.id < (LENGTH(t.TABLE_NAME) - LENGTH(REPLACE(t.TABLE_NAME, '_', '')) + 1) where t.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and t.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' group by t.TABLE_NAME) t
left join information_schema.columns ac on t.`TABLE_CATALOG` = ac.`TABLE_CATALOG` and t.`TABLE_NAME` = ac.`TABLE_NAME` and ac.`COLUMN_KEY` != "PRI" and ac.COLUMN_NAME not in ( 'projectId', 'projectType', 'projectIds', 'objType', 'objId' ) left join information_schema.columns c on t.`TABLE_CATALOG` = c.`TABLE_CATALOG` and t.`TABLE_NAME` = c.`TABLE_NAME` and c.COLUMN_NAME in ( 'projectId', 'projectType', 'projectIds', 'objType', 'objId' ) left join information_schema.columns pc on t.`TABLE_CATALOG` = pc.`TABLE_CATALOG` and t.`TABLE_NAME` = pc.`TABLE_NAME` and pc.`COLUMN_KEY` = "PRI" where t.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and c.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and pc.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and ac.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and t.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' group by tableName) t where queryColumns in ( "projectId", "projectIds", "projectId,projectType", "objId,objType" ) and tableName not in ('pm_project')

select *, concat( "insert into ", tableName, "(", columns, ") select * from ( select ", replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( columnsWithAlias, concat(tableAlias, ".projectId,"), "'$projectId$' as projectId," ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectType,"), "'$projectType$' as projectType," ), concat(tableAlias, ".objId,"), "'$objId$' as objId," ), concat(tableAlias, ".objType,"), "'$objType$' as objType," ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectCode,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.projectCode, ", tableAlias, ".projectCode) projectCode,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectName,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.projectName, ", tableAlias, ".projectName) projectName,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".contractNo,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.customInfo ->> '$.contractNo', ", tableAlias, ".contractNo) contractNo,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".officeCode,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.column001, ", tableAlias, ".officeCode) officeCode,") ), " from ", tableName, " as ", tableAlias, " left join pm_project nph on nph.projectId = '$projectId$' and nph.projectType = '$projectType$' ", " where ", whereColumns , " ) ", tableAlias ) as `insertSql`, IF( queryColumns = "projectIds", concat( "update ", tableName, " as ", tableAlias, " set ", tableAlias, ".projectIds = concat(projectIds, ',$projectId$') where FIND_IN_SET('$oldProjectId$', ", queryColumnsWithAlias, ")" ), null ) as `updateSql`, IF(hasCustomInfo , concat( "update ", tableName, " as ", tableAlias, " set ", concat_ws(",", IF(hasCustomInfo, concat(tableAlias, ".customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(", tableAlias, ".customInfo, '{}'), '{\"transferProjectId\": $projectId$, \"transferProjectFlag\": 1}')"), null)
), " where ", whereColumns ), null ) as transferFlagSql
, concat( "MD5(concat_ws('&', IFNULL(", REPLACE( replace( replace(columnsWithAlias, concat(tableAlias, ".projectId,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".projectType,"), '' ), ",", ",'NULL'),IFNULL(" ), ",'NULL')", ")", ")" ) md5Sql
from (select *, replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( columnsWithAlias, concat(tableAlias, ".projectId,"), "'$projectId$' as projectId," ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectType,"), "'$projectType$' as projectType," ), concat(tableAlias, ".objId,"), "'$objId$' as objId," ), concat(tableAlias, ".objType,"), "'$objType$' as objType," ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectCode,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.projectCode, ", tableAlias, ".projectCode) projectCode,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectName,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.projectName, ", tableAlias, ".projectName) projectName,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".contractNo,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.customInfo ->> '$.contractNo', ", tableAlias, ".contractNo) contractNo,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".officeCode,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.column001, ", tableAlias, ".officeCode) officeCode,") ) as selectColumns, replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( concat(queryColumnsWithAlias, ",$"), "projectId,", "projectId='$oldProjectId$' AND " ), "projectType,", "projectType='$oldProjectType$' AND " ), "objId,", "objId='$oldObjId$' AND " ), "objType,", "objType='$oldObjType$' AND " ), "projectIds,", "projectIds='$oldProjectId$' AND " ), " AND $", "" ) as whereColumns from (select t.`TABLE_NAME` as tableName, t.tableAlias, group_concat(distinct pc.column_name order by pc.`ORDINAL_POSITION`) primaryKeys, group_concat(distinct c.column_name order by c.`column_name`) queryColumns, concat(group_concat(distinct c.column_name order by c.`column_name`), ",", group_concat(distinct ac.column_name order by ac.`ORDINAL_POSITION`)) columns, concat(group_concat(distinct concat(t.tableAlias, ".", c.column_name) order by c.`column_name`), ",", group_concat(distinct concat(t.tableAlias, ".", ac.column_name) order by ac.`ORDINAL_POSITION`)) columnsWithAlias, group_concat(distinct concat(t.tableAlias, ".", c.column_name) order by c.`column_name`) queryColumnsWithAlias, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'customInfo') as hasCustomInfo, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'effectiveTo') as hasEffectiveTo, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'disabled') as hasDisabled, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'deleted') as hasDeleted from (select t.*, GROUP_CONCAT( SUBSTRING( SUBSTRING_INDEX( SUBSTRING_INDEX(t.TABLE_NAME, '_', sh.id + 1), '_', - 1 ), 1, 1 ) separator "" ) as tableAlias from information_schema.tables t left join find_in_set_help sh on sh.id < (LENGTH(t.TABLE_NAME) - LENGTH(REPLACE(t.TABLE_NAME, '_', '')) + 1) where t.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and t.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' group by t.TABLE_NAME) t left join information_schema.columns ac on t.`TABLE_CATALOG` = ac.`TABLE_CATALOG` and t.`TABLE_NAME` = ac.`TABLE_NAME` and ac.`COLUMN_KEY` != "PRI" and ac.COLUMN_NAME not in ( 'projectId', 'projectType', 'projectIds', 'objType', 'objId' ) left join information_schema.columns c on t.`TABLE_CATALOG` = c.`TABLE_CATALOG` and t.`TABLE_NAME` = c.`TABLE_NAME` and c.COLUMN_NAME in ( 'projectId', 'projectType', 'projectIds', 'objType', 'objId' ) left join information_schema.columns pc on t.`TABLE_CATALOG` = pc.`TABLE_CATALOG` and t.`TABLE_NAME` = pc.`TABLE_NAME` and pc.`COLUMN_KEY` = "PRI" where t.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and c.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and pc.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and ac.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and t.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' group by tableName) t ) t where queryColumns in ( "projectId", "projectIds", "projectId,projectType", "objId,objType" ) and tableName not in ('pm_project')

select *, concat( "insert into ", tableName, "(", columns, ") select * from ( select ", replace(selectColumns, concat(tableAlias, ".customInfo"), concat("JSON_MERGE_PRESERVE(IFNULL(", tableAlias, ".customInfo, '{}'), ", transferValues, ") as customInfo")), " from ", tableName, " as ", tableAlias, IF(locate("nph.", selectColumns), " left join pm_project nph on nph.projectId = '$newProjectId$' and nph.projectType = '$newProjectType$' ", "" ), " where ", whereColumns , " ) ", tableAlias ) as `insertSql`, IF( queryColumns = "projectIds", concat( "update ", tableName, " as ", tableAlias, " set ", tableAlias, ".projectIds = concat(projectIds, ',$newProjectId$') where FIND_IN_SET('$oldProjectId$', ", queryColumnsWithAlias, ") AND !FIND_IN_SET('$newProjectId$', ", queryColumnsWithAlias, ")" ), null ) as `updateSql`, IF(hasCustomInfo , concat( "update ", tableName, " as ", tableAlias, " set ", concat_ws(",", IF(hasCustomInfo, concat(tableAlias, ".customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(JSON_MERGE_PRESERVE(IFNULL(", tableAlias, ".customInfo, '{}'), ", transferValues, "), JSON_OBJECT('transferProjectFlag', 1))"), null)
), " where ", whereColumns ), null ) as transferFlagSql
, concat( "MD5(concat_ws('&', IFNULL(", REPLACE( md5Columns, ",", ",'NULL'),IFNULL(" ), ",'NULL')", ")", ")" ) md5Sql
from (select *, replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( columnsWithAlias, concat(tableAlias, ".projectId,"), "'$newProjectId$' as projectId," ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectType,"), "'$newProjectType$' as projectType," ), concat(tableAlias, ".objId,"), "'$newObjId$' as objId," ), concat(tableAlias, ".objType,"), "$newObjType$ as objType," ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectCode,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.projectCode, ", tableAlias, ".projectCode) projectCode,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectName,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.projectName, ", tableAlias, ".projectName) projectName,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".contractNo,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.customInfo ->> '$.contractNo', ", tableAlias, ".contractNo) contractNo,") ), concat(tableAlias, ".officeCode,"), concat("IFNULL(nph.column001, ", tableAlias, ".officeCode) officeCode,") ) as selectColumns, replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( concat(queryColumnsWithAlias, ",$"), "projectId,", "projectId='$oldProjectId$' AND " ), "projectType,", "projectType='$oldProjectType$' AND " ), "objType,", "objType in ($oldObjType$) AND "
), concat(tableAlias, ".objId,"), concat("'$oldObjId$' = IF(", tableAlias, ".objType = 'project', ", tableAlias, ".objId, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(", tableAlias, ".`customInfo`, concat('$.', LOWER(REPLACE(", tableAlias, ".objType, 'project', '')), '.projectId')))) AND ") ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectIds,"), concat("FIND_IN_SET('$oldProjectId$', ", tableAlias, ".projectIds) AND ") ), " AND $", "" ) as whereColumns, replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( concat(queryColumnsWithAlias, ",$"), "projectId,", "projectId='$oldProjectId$' AND " ), "projectType,", "projectType='$oldProjectType$' AND " ), "objType,", "objType in ($oldObjType$) AND " ), "objId,", "objId='$oldObjId$' AND " ), concat(tableAlias, ".projectIds,"), concat("FIND_IN_SET('$oldProjectId$', ", tableAlias, ".projectIds) AND ") ), " AND $", "" ) as newWhereColumns, replace(replace(replace( replace(replace(replace( replace(replace(replace( replace(replace(replace( replace(concat(columnsWithAlias, ",$"), concat(tableAlias, ".projectId,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".projectType,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".projectCode,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".projectName,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".contractNo,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".officeCode,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".updateBy,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".updateTime,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".effectiveTo,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".customInfo,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".disabled,"), ''), concat(tableAlias, ".deleted,"), ''), ",$", "" ) AS md5Columns,
concat("concat_ws('&', IFNULL(", REPLACE(primaryKeysWithAlias, ",", ",'NULL'),IFNULL("), ",'NULL')", ")") as oldPrimaryValues, concat("JSON_OBJECT('transferToProjectId', $newProjectId$, 'transferFromProjectId', $oldProjectId$, 'oldPrimaryKeys', '", primaryKeys, "', 'oldPrimaryValues', ", concat("concat_ws('&', IFNULL(", REPLACE(primaryKeysWithAlias, ",", ",'NULL'),IFNULL("), ",'NULL')", ")"), ")") as transferValues
from (select t.`TABLE_NAME` as tableName, t.tableAlias, group_concat(distinct pc.column_name order by pc.`ORDINAL_POSITION`) primaryKeys, group_concat(distinct c.column_name order by c.`column_name`) queryColumns, concat(group_concat(distinct c.column_name order by c.`column_name`), ",", group_concat(distinct ac.column_name order by ac.`ORDINAL_POSITION`)) columns, concat(group_concat(distinct concat(t.tableAlias, ".", c.column_name) order by c.`column_name`), ",", group_concat(distinct concat(t.tableAlias, ".", ac.column_name) order by ac.`ORDINAL_POSITION`)) columnsWithAlias, group_concat(distinct concat(t.tableAlias, ".", c.column_name) order by c.`column_name`) queryColumnsWithAlias, group_concat(distinct concat(t.tableAlias, ".", pc.column_name) order by pc.`ORDINAL_POSITION`) primaryKeysWithAlias, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'customInfo') as hasCustomInfo, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'effectiveTo') as hasEffectiveTo, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'disabled') as hasDisabled, max(ac.`COLUMN_NAME` = 'deleted') as hasDeleted from (select t.*, GROUP_CONCAT( SUBSTRING( SUBSTRING_INDEX( SUBSTRING_INDEX(t.TABLE_NAME, '_', sh.id + 1), '_', - 1 ), 1, 1 ) separator "" ) as tableAlias from information_schema.tables t left join find_in_set_help sh on sh.id < (LENGTH(t.TABLE_NAME) - LENGTH(REPLACE(t.TABLE_NAME, '_', '')) + 1) where t.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and t.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' group by t.TABLE_NAME) t left join information_schema.columns ac on t.`TABLE_CATALOG` = ac.`TABLE_CATALOG` and t.`TABLE_NAME` = ac.`TABLE_NAME` and ac.`COLUMN_KEY` != "PRI" and ac.COLUMN_NAME not in ( 'projectId', 'projectType', 'projectIds', 'objType', 'objId' ) left join information_schema.columns c on t.`TABLE_CATALOG` = c.`TABLE_CATALOG` and t.`TABLE_NAME` = c.`TABLE_NAME` and c.COLUMN_NAME in ( 'projectId', 'projectType', 'projectIds', 'objType', 'objId' ) left join information_schema.columns pc on t.`TABLE_CATALOG` = pc.`TABLE_CATALOG` and t.`TABLE_NAME` = pc.`TABLE_NAME` and pc.`COLUMN_KEY` = "PRI" where t.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and c.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and pc.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and ac.TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and t.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' group by tableName) t ) t where queryColumns in ( "projectId", "projectIds", "projectId,projectType", "objId,objType" ) and tableName not in ('pm_project')
